data.body: 4001 GREEN: implementer (held out from fsck recovery oracle) changed only compact.py; full suite incl. 3 held-out tests passes (8/8). Teeth: mutation 'if True' (force remove) -> 3 RED; restore -> green. Added compact->fsck recovery note to docs/concurrency.md. Preflight: lint clean, typecheck clean, tests/interfaces/lifecycle 283 pass. Committing as bottom of stack.
